nasb.text: and the four hundred pomegranates for the two networks, two rows of pomegranates for each network to cover the two bowls of the capitals which were on the pillars.

esv.text: and the 400 pomegranates for the two latticeworks, two rows of pomegranates for each latticework, to cover the two bowls of the capitals that were on the pillars.

cnv.text: 又有四百個石榴，安放在兩個網子上，每個網子有兩行石榴，遮蓋柱子上頭兩個碗形的柱頂。

ccb.text: 用来装饰碗状柱冠、安在两个网子上的四百石榴——每个网子上两行；
